task: Polish the merged Study readiness layout so it matches the reviewed prototype quality.
teamCritique: The session gate should use a strong blue bordered panel rather than a passive inset note.
The default gate copy should show the blocker summary and action links rather than checking text.
Readiness item text should use a consistent constrained track so tags remain single-line on desktop.
On reduced viewports readiness tags should stack above title and hint text.
The study caption should resolve to the linked project name.
implementationSummary: Replaced weak session gate fallback copy with prototype-style blocker summary links.
Styled the session gate as a blue bordered panel.
Added tolerant project title resolution for common project name field shapes.
Let the GOV.UK half-column define Study readiness row width, with the GOV.UK 15px gutter between text and status.
Removed visible checking defaults from rendered readiness markup.
Stacked readiness status tags above text on small viewports.
Bumped the Study page script version and regenerated the static Study page.

validation.command: Browser desktop rendering check at http://127.0.0.1:8787/pages/study/
validation.evidence: session gate rendered with a 5px GOV.UK blue border, the blocker summary, three action links, a GOV.UK 15px text/status gutter, and single-line readiness tags
readiness status tags appear above title and hint text
focused Study page route-state test passed
focused Study and breadcrumb route-state tests passed
